raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.3,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the look focus primarily on technical argument validity or on sentence-level writing polish?","rationale":{"R1.2":"A broad request to look at a technical research paragraph can reasonably include checking whether the mathematical and argumentative sequence holds together.","R1.6":"Because the delegation refers to a paragraph without specifying technical review, sentence- and paragraph-level readability is a central expected responsibility.","RX.1":"Any projection should disclose uncertainty because the delegation is highly underspecified.","RX.2":"The reviewer should avoid inferring stronger requested duties than the short delegation supports.","RX.3":"The projection must stay within assessing the requested paragraph rather than executing edits or broader review.","RX.4":"Technical feedback on optimization and robustness claims should avoid causing downstream misuse through unsupported validation.","RX.5":"Any responsibility assignment should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the artifact’s research-writing content."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the look focus primarily on technical argument validity or on sentence-level writing polish?

rationale.R1.2: A broad request to look at a technical research paragraph can reasonably include checking whether the mathematical and argumentative sequence holds together.
rationale.R1.6: Because the delegation refers to a paragraph without specifying technical review, sentence- and paragraph-level readability is a central expected responsibility.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection should disclose uncertainty because the delegation is highly underspecified.
rationale.RX.2: The reviewer should avoid inferring stronger requested duties than the short delegation supports.
rationale.RX.3: The projection must stay within assessing the requested paragraph rather than executing edits or broader review.
rationale.RX.4: Technical feedback on optimization and robustness claims should avoid causing downstream misuse through unsupported validation.
rationale.RX.5: Any responsibility assignment should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the artifact’s research-writing content.
